issues.sample: Front belt sprocket internal gears were ground away.  It didn't allow the engine sprocket to turn the pulley that drives the belt powering the rear tire.  Resulted in a loss of propulsion while traveling at 55 MPH making riding to a safe location difficult, had to coast off the r
It would not downshift or go into reverse. I have to replace the LH Multifunction switch.
